word: H7278 - רֶגֶם מֶלֶךְ - Regem Melek - reh'-gem meh'-lek - Regem-melech

sections.paragraph:
Original: רגם מלך

Transliteration: regem melek

Phonetic: reh'-gem meh'-lek

BDB Definition:

Regem-melech = "king's heap"
  1. a man sent by some of the captivity to make enquiries at the temple concerning fasting

Origin: from H7276 and H4428

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
